case_title: GEOVERDE CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION VS. CHAPEAU, INC., A UTAH CORPOPRATION DBA BLUEPOITN E et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JAN-21-2005 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT FILED. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEOVERDE CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION ALSO FILED BY DEFENDANT CHAPEAU, INC., A UTAH CORPOPRATION DBA BLUEPOITN E NERGY, INC. ARCHBOLD, GUY

STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT FILED; THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GEOVERDE CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHAPEAU, INC., A UTAH CORPOPRATION DBA BLUEPOITN E NERGY, INC. ARCHBOLD, GUY $43,212.98 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $43,212.98, RE PAYMENT PLAN, PLS. SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED, AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPEAU, INC., A UTAH CORPOPRATION DBA BLUEPOITN E NERGY, INC. ARCHBOLD, GUY

CONTRACT/WARRANTY, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEOVERDE CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPEAU, INC., A UTAH CORPOPRATION DBA BLUEPOITN E NERGY, INC. ARCHBOLD, GUY DOES 1-25, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JAN-21-2005 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  OCT-19-2004 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JAN-06-2005
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEOVERDE CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION SERVED SEP-07-2004, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARCHBOLD, GUY

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GEOVERDE CORPORATION, A DELAWARE CORPORATION SERVED SEP-07-2004, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHAPEAU, INC., A UTAH CORPOPRATION DBA BLUEPOITN E NERGY, INC.
